details.name: critical-incident-sentinel
details.description: Local-only critical sentinel. Immediate alert exception path only.

payload.message: Run local sentinel only: python C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\openclaw-prod\\scripts\\ops_control.py --db-path C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.config\\openclaw-prod\\ops.db sentinel --timezone America/Chicago. If output is CRITICAL_ALERT_SENT return [ACTION REQUIRED] Critical incident notification dispatched. If output is CRITICAL_ALERT_QUEUED_NO_CHANNEL return [ACTION REQUIRED] Critical incident queued but no alert channel is configured. Otherwise return blank.

content.text:
{
  "id": "agent-heartbeat-monitor-15m",
  "agentId": "shared_master_orchestrator",
  "name": "agent-heartbeat-monitor",
  "description": "Monitor critical agent heartbeats every 15 minutes",
  "enabled": true,
  "createdAtMs": 1773341200000,
  "updatedAtMs": 1773444751525,
  "schedule": {
    "kind": "cron",
    "expr": "*/15 * * * *",
    "tz": "America/New_York"
  },
  "sessionTarget": "isolated",
  "wakeMode": "now",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "agentTurn",
    "message": "HEARTBEAT MONITOR: Check critical agent status. Thresholds: d1_ceo (>6 hours), d1_cto (>6 hours), shared_master_orchestrator (>30 minutes). If any agent exceeds threshold, report escalation details. Silent if all healthy.",
    "thinking": "low",
    "lightContext": true
  },
  "delivery": {
    "mode": "announce",
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "7737707872",
    "bestEffort": true
  },
  "state": {
    "consecutiveErrors": 0,
    "lastRunAtMs": 1773434714828,
    "lastRunStatus": "ok",
    "lastStatus": "ok",
    "lastDurationMs": 31527,
    "lastDeliveryStatus": "delivered",
    "lastDelivered": true,
    "nextRunAtMs": 1773445500000
  },
  "failureAlert": {
    "after": 2,
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "7737707872",
    "cooldownMs": 3600000,
    "mode": "announce"
  }
}

details.name: agent-heartbeat-monitor
details.description: Monitor critical agent heartbeats every 15 minutes

payload.message: HEARTBEAT MONITOR: Check critical agent status. Thresholds: d1_ceo (>6 hours), d1_cto (>6 hours), shared_master_orchestrator (>30 minutes). If any agent exceeds threshold, report escalation details. Silent if all healthy.

content.text:
{
  "id": "agent-network-health-hourly",
  "agentId": "shared_master_orchestrator",
  "name": "agent-network-health-check",
  "description": "Hourly health check across all active agents in the 75-agent network",
  "enabled": true,
  "createdAtMs": 1773341200000,
  "updatedAtMs": 1773444751546,
  "schedule": {
    "kind": "cron",
    "expr": "0 * * * *",
    "tz": "America/New_York",
    "staggerMs": 300000
  },
  "sessionTarget": "isolated",
  "wakeMode": "now",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "agentTurn",
    "message": "AGENT NETWORK HEALTH CHECK: Query Supabase agent_metrics table for all agents. Report: 1) Agents with heartbeat > 30 min stale. 2) Error rates above 5%. 3) Response times above threshold. 4) Memory utilization. Escalate critical issues to d1_cto. Format as Telegram-friendly summary."
  },
  "delivery": {
    "mode": "none",
    "channel": "last"
  },
  "state": {
    "consecutiveErrors": 0,
    "lastRunAtMs": 1773436168286,
    "lastRunStatus": "ok",
    "lastStatus": "ok",
    "lastDurationMs": 84910,
    "lastDeliveryStatus": "not-delivered",
    "lastDelivered": false,
    "nextRunAtMs": 1773446652495
  },
  "failureAlert": {
    "after": 3,
    "channel": "telegram",
    "to": "7737707872",
    "cooldownMs": 21600000,
    "mode": "announce"
  }
}

details.name: agent-network-health-check
details.description: Hourly health check across all active agents in the 75-agent network

payload.message: AGENT NETWORK HEALTH CHECK: Query Supabase agent_metrics table for all agents. Report: 1) Agents with heartbeat > 30 min stale. 2) Error rates above 5%. 3) Response times above threshold. 4) Memory utilization. Escalate critical issues to d1_cto. Format as Telegram-friendly summary.
